Mr. Epstein,
 

  
 

Larry asked that I send the data on this
aircraft.  This is the one he thought was based in
 Miami but as it turns out it is actually
based in CA.  The aircraft is currently on a charter flight to
 Japan and will
not return for about 10 days.  
 

  
 

The official asking price is $35.950 but
the owner has indicated $34.5.  The aircraft is due engine mid life
inspections in about 600 hours at a cost of $1.7 million to include
loaners.  
 

  
 



Best
regards,
 

 
 

 
 

Sean J.
Lancaster 
 

Bristol
Associates Inc. 
 

1-540-665-5135

these are the photos from controller.com...  what else is out there with approximate real prices.

----- Original Message ----
From: Sean J. Lancaster <bristolgv@earthlink.net>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: lvjet@aol.com
Sent: Tuesday, November 14, 2006 1:40:07 PM
Subject: FW: GV sn 506

Mr. Epstein,

 

Larry asked that I send the data on this aircraft.  This is the one he thought was based in Miami but as it turns out it is actually based in CA.  The aircraft is currently on a charter flight to Japan and will not return for about 10 days. 

 

The official asking price is $35.950 but the owner has indicated $34.5.  The aircraft is due engine mid life inspections in about 600 hours at a cost of $1.7 million to include loaners. 

 

Best regards,

 

 

Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.
